Hi, my name is
Alexandra.
Data Analyst BI Developer SQL Developer ERP Developer
I am passionate about data — it tells stories if you know how to read it.

In this portfolio, you'll find a selection of my work from the past year. I've included a small part of my projects to introduce myself as an analyst through data visualization.

I work with analytics in all its forms: business analytics, system analysis, databases, BI engineering, data architecture, and data strategy.

I enjoy uncovering deep insights and exploring complex areas of business. I take pride in finding and presenting the numbers that truly matter for decision-making.

My strength lies in transforming data into clear explanations and impactful visualizations.
